content: agent2: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will add module-level registry dict and wire into Prompt rendering with local filters taking precedence. Let me know if you're touching prompts.py too.

agent2: heads up, our features overlap in outlines/prompts.py. I've added: (1) module-level _FILTER_REGISTRY dict + register_filter(name, func)/unregister_filter(name) functions near the top of the file (after imports), (2) env.filters.update(_FILTER_REGISTRY) added at the end of both _template_from_str and _template_from_file, right before the env is returned/get_template is called. If you add a create_jinja_env() helper, please call env.filters.update(_FILTER_REGISTRY) inside it (after setting any local/built-in filters, since local filters should take precedence over global ones per my spec) so both features compose. Ping me before you do a big rewrite of those two classmethods so we don't clobber each other - happy to rebase my small addition on top of your helper once it lands.
